page_content:
Prerequisite: PERS201; or must have appropriate World Language Placement (WLP).

Restriction: Must not be native/fluent speaker of Persian.

PERS205 Intensive Intermediate Persian | (6 Credits)

Development of Persian language proficiency and cultural knowledge at the intermediate level (Intermediate-Mid on ACTFL scale). Taught in Persian.

Prerequisite: PERS106; or equivalent as determined by World Language Placement (WLP).
